message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-admin-state-enums): pin ConnectorInventoryMutationKind + LifecycleAction + LogSeverity + HostEventKind + SimulatePhase wire format (resolves flywheel_connectors-1790u)

20 tests pinning 5 operator-facing admin RPC enums every dashboard,
alerting rule, and audit pipeline consumes from /admin/* endpoints.
Drift breaks external consumers.

- ConnectorInventoryMutationKind 2 snake_case variants:
  install / update
- LifecycleAction 6 snake_case variants (operator verbs):
  enable / disable / restart / reload / uninstall / promote — drift
  breaks automation scripts
- LogSeverity 4 snake_case variants (syslog-style):
  debug / info / warn / error — alerting filter contract
- HostEventKind 7 snake_case variants:
  lifecycle_transition / health_check / config_revision /
  rollout_decision / supply_chain_verification / drift_detected /
  connector_state_change
- SimulatePhase 4 snake_case variants:
  preflight_only / connector_reached / connector_unsupported /
  timed_out — operator visibility into simulation depth
- Each enum rejects mixed-case / camelCase / unknown / empty +
  variants distinct on PartialEq + Copy on hot paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
